title: Beef and Irish Stew
description: A hearty beef stew with the flavors of Ireland. Rich, savory, and comforting.
instructions: Season the beef with salt and pepper.
In a large pot, cook the bacon over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the bacon and set aside.
Add the beef to the pot and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the onion, carrots, and potatoes to the pot.
Pour in the Irish stout and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 1 1/2 hours.
Return the bacon to the pot and cook for an additional 15 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley.
